name: RedditFilter
subtitle: Reddit feed filtering tweak
description: AltStore/Feather/SideStore/LiveContainer source for RedditFilter. Filter out unwanted content from your Reddit feed, including promoted posts, recommendations, livestreams, NSFW posts, and awards.

apps.name: RedditFilter
apps.subtitle: RedditFilter
apps.localizedDescription: Filter out unwanted content from your Reddit feed: promoted posts, recommendations, livestreams, NSFW content, and awards.

versions.localizedDescription:
Changes:
- Fix app crash (@NicholasBly)
- Fix ad comments showing under posts (@Laitinlok)
- Fix popular feed not showing with recommendations disabled
- Move RedditFilter settings to the user drawer / side bar (accessed by tapping the profile picture in the top right)

apps.name: RXTikTok
apps.subtitle: The Most Awesome TikTok Tweak for iOS
apps.versionDescription:
RXTikTok 1.6.6 RELEASE:

ADDED:
- [NEW] Bypass Russia Ban 🇷🇺 (without VPN)
- Block More Types of ADs/Content
  · MovieTok
  · AI Generated Content
  · Appstore App Downloads
- Save Your Drafts/Posts Without Watermarks
- Download Live Photos as Videos
- Download Stickers
- Remove Sticker Recommendations
- Confirmation for Quick Sharing
- Confirmation for Quick Reposting
- Hide RX Elements in Screenshots
- Upload Custom Voice Messages
- Remove Report Flag in DMs

FIXED:
- “Hide ADs”
- Story Videos Crashing
- Photo Quality Downloads
- Photo Comments Not Saving
- Importing Configurations
- Some Feature Descriptions Cut Early
- Fake Verification Badge
- “Hide Play/Pause Button” Black Stories
- Some Broken Strings

CHANGED:
- Profile Picture Saving Layout
- Refactored Filtering Settings
  · New submenu in “Feed Settings”

REMOVED:
- Enable HD Uploads
- Comment Location Flags
(these 2 features were either partially or entirely broken)
apps.localizedDescription: RXTikTok is a TikTok tweak that blocks ads/recommendations, removes watermarks on saved drafts, downloads Live Photos and stickers, and adds a range of privacy and UX tweaks on top of the official TikTok app.
